title: Create a documentation site
description: Generates a documentation site. Use the `framework` option to select the underlying docs framework.

examples.description: Generate a docs site using Astro (default framework)
Generate an Astro docs site without the automated translation pipeline

name.description: The name of the docs project.
name.x-prompt: What name would you like to use for the docs project?

directory.description: The parent directory the docs project is placed in.
directory.x-prompt: Which parent directory would you like to place the docs project in?

subDirectory.description: The sub directory the docs project is placed in. Defaults to the kebab-case project name.
subDirectory.x-prompt: Which sub directory should the docs project be created in? (default: kebab-case of the name)

framework.x-prompt: Which documentation framework would you like to use?

noTranslation.description: Opt out of the automated documentation translation pipeline (Strands Agent on Amazon Bedrock + a `translate` project target).
noTranslation.x-prompt: Would you like to opt out of automated documentation translation?

noBlog.description: Opt out of the `starlight-blog` plugin and the sample blog post.
noBlog.x-prompt: Would you like to opt out of the blog?

skipInstall.description: Skip installing dependencies after the generator runs.
